title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. schiwereckii
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. schiwereckii, also known as vulnerary or kidney vetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing urinary tract infections, relieving symptoms of menopause, and supporting kidney function. Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. schiwereckii is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
